---
title: "new_project_draft"
format: html
---

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(tidytext)
library(stringr)
library(ggplot2)
library(broom)
library(cluster)
library(knitr)
library(Matrix)
library(irlba)
library(scales)
library(forcats)
library(MASS)
```

```{r load-and-clean-data}
reviews <- readr::read_csv("Womens Clothing E-Commerce Reviews.csv")

df2 <- reviews %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    review_id = dplyr::row_number(),
    `Review Text` = as.character(`Review Text`),
    Age = as.numeric(Age),
    Rating = as.numeric(Rating),
    `Positive Feedback Count` = as.numeric(`Positive Feedback Count`),
    `Recommended IND` = dplyr::case_when(
      `Recommended IND` %in% c(1, "1", TRUE, "TRUE", "True") ~ 1L,
      `Recommended IND` %in% c(0, "0", FALSE, "FALSE", "False") ~ 0L,
      TRUE ~ NA_integer_
    ),
    `Department Name` = as.character(`Department Name`)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(`Review Text`), stringr::str_trim(`Review Text`) != "") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    review_text_clean = stringr::str_squish(`Review Text`),
    word_count = stringr::str_count(review_text_clean, stringr::boundary("word")),
    char_count = stringr::str_length(review_text_clean)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(
    review_id,
    `Review Text`,
    Rating,
    `Recommended IND`,
    `Positive Feedback Count`,
    Age,
    `Department Name`,
    review_text_clean,
    word_count,
    char_count
  )

clean_df <- df2 %>%
  dplyr::select(review_id, review_text_clean) %>%
  tidytext::unnest_tokens(word, review_text_clean) %>%
  dplyr::anti_join(tidytext::stop_words, by = "word") %>%
  dplyr::filter(
    !is.na(word),
    word != "",
    !stringr::str_detect(word, "^[0-9]+$"),
    stringr::str_detect(word, "[a-z]"),
    stringr::str_length(word) >= 3
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(review_id, word)
```

```{r standardize-inputs}
required_df2_cols <- c(
  "review_id",
  "Review Text",
  "Rating",
  "Recommended IND",
  "Positive Feedback Count",
  "Age",
  "Department Name",
  "word_count",
  "char_count"
)

required_clean_cols <- c("review_id", "word")

missing_df2 <- setdiff(required_df2_cols, names(df2))
missing_clean <- setdiff(required_clean_cols, names(clean_df))

if (length(missing_df2) > 0) {
  stop(paste("df2 is missing:", paste(missing_df2, collapse = ", ")))
}

if (length(missing_clean) > 0) {
  stop(paste("clean_df is missing:", paste(missing_clean, collapse = ", ")))
}

df2 <- df2 %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    review_id = as.character(review_id),
    `Recommended IND` = dplyr::case_when(
      `Recommended IND` %in% c(1, "1", TRUE, "TRUE", "True") ~ 1L,
      `Recommended IND` %in% c(0, "0", FALSE, "FALSE", "False") ~ 0L,
      TRUE ~ NA_integer_
    )
  )

clean_df <- clean_df %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    review_id = as.character(review_id),
    word = as.character(word)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(review_id), !is.na(word), word != "")
```

```{r eda-overview}
cat("Rows in df2:", nrow(df2), "\n")
cat("Columns in df2:", ncol(df2), "\n")

glimpse(df2)

missing_summary <- tibble::tibble(
  variable = names(df2),
  missing_count = sapply(df2, function(x) sum(is.na(x))),
  missing_percent = round(100 * missing_count / nrow(df2), 2)
) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(missing_count))

missing_summary %>%
  knitr::kable(caption = "Missingness Summary for Cleaned Review-Level Data")
```

```{r eda-distributions}
rating_balance <- df2 %>%
  dplyr::count(Rating) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(proportion = n / sum(n))

recommend_balance <- df2 %>%
  dplyr::count(`Recommended IND`) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    recommendation = dplyr::case_when(
      `Recommended IND` == 1 ~ "Recommended",
      `Recommended IND` == 0 ~ "Not Recommended",
      TRUE ~ "Missing"
    ),
    proportion = n / sum(n)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(recommendation, n, proportion)

department_balance <- df2 %>%
  dplyr::count(`Department Name`, sort = TRUE) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(proportion = n / sum(n))

rating_balance %>% knitr::kable(caption = "Distribution of Ratings")
recommend_balance %>% knitr::kable(caption = "Distribution of Recommendation Status")
department_balance %>% knitr::kable(caption = "Distribution of Reviews by Department")
```

```{r eda-plots-1, fig.width=8, fig.height=5}
ggplot2::ggplot(rating_balance, ggplot2::aes(x = factor(Rating), y = proportion)) +
  ggplot2::geom_col() +
  ggplot2::scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format()) +
  ggplot2::labs(
    title = "Proportion of Reviews by Rating",
    x = "Rating",
    y = "Proportion"
  ) +
  ggplot2::theme_minimal()
```

```{r eda-plots-2, fig.width=8, fig.height=5}
ggplot2::ggplot(department_balance, ggplot2::aes(x = reorder(`Department Name`, n), y = n)) +
  ggplot2::geom_col() +
  ggplot2::coord_flip() +
  ggplot2::labs(
    title = "Number of Reviews by Department",
    x = "Department",
    y = "Count"
  ) +
  ggplot2::theme_minimal()
```

```{r eda-length-summary}
length_quantiles <- df2 %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    word_q25 = quantile(word_count, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    word_q50 = quantile(word_count, 0.50, na.rm = TRUE),
    word_q75 = quantile(word_count, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    word_q90 = quantile(word_count, 0.90, na.rm = TRUE),
    word_q95 = quantile(word_count, 0.95, na.rm = TRUE),
    word_q99 = quantile(word_count, 0.99, na.rm = TRUE),
    char_q25 = quantile(char_count, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    char_q50 = quantile(char_count, 0.50, na.rm = TRUE),
    char_q75 = quantile(char_count, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    char_q90 = quantile(char_count, 0.90, na.rm = TRUE),
    char_q95 = quantile(char_count, 0.95, na.rm = TRUE),
    char_q99 = quantile(char_count, 0.99, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

length_quantiles %>% knitr::kable(caption = "Quantiles for Review Length")
```

```{r eda-plots-3, fig.width=8, fig.height=5}
ggplot2::ggplot(df2, ggplot2::aes(x = word_count)) +
  ggplot2::geom_histogram(bins = 50) +
  ggplot2::labs(
    title = "Distribution of Review Word Count",
    x = "Word Count",
    y = "Frequency"
  ) +
  ggplot2::theme_minimal()
```

```{r eda-plots-5, fig.width=8, fig.height=5}
ggplot2::ggplot(df2, ggplot2::aes(x = word_count)) +
  ggplot2::geom_histogram(bins = 50) +
  ggplot2::scale_x_log10() +
  ggplot2::labs(
    title = "Distribution of Review Word Count (Log Scale)",
    x = "Word Count (log scale)",
    y = "Frequency"
  ) +
  ggplot2::theme_minimal()
```

```{r eda-rating-summary}
rating_length_summary <- df2 %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Rating) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    avg_word_count = mean(word_count, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_word_count = median(word_count, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_char_count = mean(char_count, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_char_count = median(char_count, na.rm = TRUE),
    recommend_rate = mean(`Recommended IND`, na.rm = TRUE),
    n = dplyr::n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(Rating)

rating_length_summary %>%
  knitr::kable(caption = "Review Length and Recommendation by Rating")
```

```{r eda-plots-6, fig.width=8, fig.height=5}
ggplot2::ggplot(df2, ggplot2::aes(x = factor(Rating), y = word_count)) +
  ggplot2::geom_boxplot() +
  ggplot2::coord_cartesian(ylim = quantile(df2$word_count, c(0, 0.95), na.rm = TRUE)) +
  ggplot2::labs(
    title = "Review Word Count by Rating",
    x = "Rating",
    y = "Word Count"
  ) +
  ggplot2::theme_minimal()
```

```{r eda-plots-7, fig.width=8, fig.height=5}
ggplot2::ggplot(df2, ggplot2::aes(x = factor(Rating), fill = factor(`Recommended IND`))) +
  ggplot2::geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  ggplot2::scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format()) +
  ggplot2::labs(
    title = "Recommendation Rate by Rating",
    x = "Rating",
    y = "Proportion",
    fill = "Recommended"
  ) +
  ggplot2::theme_minimal()
```

```{r eda-department-summary}
department_summary_eda <- df2 %>%
  dplyr::group_by(`Department Name`) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    avg_rating = mean(Rating, na.rm = TRUE),
    recommend_rate = mean(`Recommended IND`, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_word_count = mean(word_count, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_char_count = mean(char_count, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_feedback = mean(`Positive Feedback Count`, na.rm = TRUE),
    n = dplyr::n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(avg_rating))

department_summary_eda %>%
  knitr::kable(caption = "Department-Level Review Summary")
```

```{r eda-plots-10, fig.width=8, fig.height=6}
rating_department_heatmap <- df2 %>%
  dplyr::count(`Department Name`, Rating) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(`Department Name`) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(prop_within_department = n / sum(n)) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup()

ggplot2::ggplot(
  rating_department_heatmap,
  ggplot2::aes(
    x = factor(Rating),
    y = forcats::fct_reorder(`Department Name`, n, .fun = sum),
    fill = prop_within_department
  )
) +
  ggplot2::geom_tile() +
  ggplot2::scale_fill_gradient(low = "white", high = "steelblue", labels = scales::percent_format()) +
  ggplot2::labs(
    title = "Rating Composition Within Each Department",
    x = "Rating",
    y = "Department",
    fill = "Within-Dept %"
  ) +
  ggplot2::theme_minimal()
```

```{r eda-feedback-summary}
feedback_by_length_bin <- df2 %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    length_bin = dplyr::case_when(
      word_count < 20 ~ "<20",
      word_count < 50 ~ "20-49",
      word_count < 100 ~ "50-99",
      word_count < 200 ~ "100-199",
      TRUE ~ "200+"
    )
  ) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(length_bin) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    avg_feedback = mean(`Positive Feedback Count`, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_rating = mean(Rating, na.rm = TRUE),
    n = dplyr::n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

feedback_by_length_bin %>% knitr::kable(caption = "Average Feedback by Review-Length Bin")
```

```{r eda-plots-11, fig.width=8, fig.height=5}
ggplot2::ggplot(df2, ggplot2::aes(x = word_count, y = `Positive Feedback Count`)) +
  ggplot2::geom_point(alpha = 0.15) +
  ggplot2::coord_cartesian(
    xlim = quantile(df2$word_count, c(0, 0.99), na.rm = TRUE),
    ylim = quantile(df2$`Positive Feedback Count`, c(0, 0.99), na.rm = TRUE)
  ) +
  ggplot2::labs(
    title = "Review Length vs Positive Feedback Count",
    x = "Word Count",
    y = "Positive Feedback Count"
  ) +
  ggplot2::theme_minimal()
```

```{r eda-plots-12, fig.width=8, fig.height=5}
ggplot2::ggplot(feedback_by_length_bin, ggplot2::aes(x = length_bin, y = avg_feedback)) +
  ggplot2::geom_col() +
  ggplot2::labs(
    title = "Average Positive Feedback by Review-Length Bin",
    x = "Review-Length Bin",
    y = "Average Positive Feedback Count"
  ) +
  ggplot2::theme_minimal()
```

```{r prepare-clustering-data}
df2 <- df2 %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    review_id = as.character(review_id),
    `Recommended IND` = as.integer(`Recommended IND`),
    Rating = as.numeric(Rating),
    `Positive Feedback Count` = as.numeric(`Positive Feedback Count`),
    Age = as.numeric(Age),
    `Department Name` = as.character(`Department Name`),
    word_count = as.numeric(word_count),
    char_count = as.numeric(char_count)
  )

clean_df <- clean_df %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    review_id = as.character(review_id),
    word = stringr::str_to_lower(as.character(word))
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(review_id), !is.na(word), word != "")
```

```{r build-clean-df-fast}
clothing_stop_words <- c(
  "dress", "dresses", "shirt", "shirts", "top", "tops",
  "sweater", "sweaters", "pant", "pants", "jean", "jeans",
  "skirt", "skirts", "jacket", "jackets", "blouse", "blouses",
  "cardigan", "cardigans", "leggings", "legging", "coat", "coats",
  "bra", "bras", "robe", "robes", "tee", "tees", "tank", "tanks",
  "jumpsuit", "jumpsuits", "shorts", "short", "item", "items",
  "piece", "pieces", "clothes", "clothing", "garment", "garments", "sock", "socks"
)

generic_review_words <- c(
  "wear", "wore", "buy", "bought", "order", "ordered"
)

clean_df_fast <- clean_df %>%
  dplyr::filter(!word %in% c(clothing_stop_words, generic_review_words)) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!stringr::str_detect(word, "[0-9]")) %>%
  dplyr::filter(stringr::str_length(word) >= 3)
```

```{r define-helper-functions-1}
build_tfidf_fast <- function(clean_df_fast,
                             min_doc_freq = 15,
                             max_doc_prop = 0.30) {
  review_word_counts <- clean_df_fast %>%
    dplyr::count(review_id, word, name = "n")

  total_docs <- dplyr::n_distinct(review_word_counts$review_id)

  vocab <- review_word_counts %>%
    dplyr::group_by(word) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(doc_n = dplyr::n_distinct(review_id), .groups = "drop") %>%
    dplyr::mutate(doc_prop = doc_n / total_docs) %>%
    dplyr::filter(doc_n >= min_doc_freq, doc_prop <= max_doc_prop)

  tfidf_df <- review_word_counts %>%
    dplyr::inner_join(vocab %>% dplyr::select(word), by = "word") %>%
    tidytext::bind_tf_idf(term = word, document = review_id, n = n)

  dtm <- tfidf_df %>%
    tidytext::cast_sparse(row = review_id, column = word, value = tf_idf)

  list(
    dtm = dtm,
    vocab = vocab
  )
}

row_normalize_sparse <- function(m) {
  row_norms <- sqrt(Matrix::rowSums(m ^ 2))
  row_norms[row_norms == 0] <- 1
  out <- Matrix::Diagonal(x = 1 / row_norms) %*% m
  rownames(out) <- rownames(m)
  colnames(out) <- colnames(m)
  out
}

build_svd_features_fast <- function(dtm_norm, n_components = 40) {
  svd_res <- irlba::irlba(dtm_norm, nv = n_components)
  text_embed <- svd_res$u %*% diag(svd_res$d)
  text_embed <- as.data.frame(text_embed)
  colnames(text_embed) <- paste0("svd_", seq_len(ncol(text_embed)))
  text_embed$review_id <- rownames(dtm_norm)

  list(
    svd_res = svd_res,
    svd_df = text_embed
  )
}
```

```{r define-helper-functions-2}
build_cluster_feature_df_fast <- function(df2_sub,
                                          clean_df_sub,
                                          min_doc_freq = 15,
                                          max_doc_prop = 0.30,
                                          n_components = 40) {
  tfidf_obj <- build_tfidf_fast(
    clean_df_fast = clean_df_sub,
    min_doc_freq = min_doc_freq,
    max_doc_prop = max_doc_prop
  )

  dtm_norm <- row_normalize_sparse(tfidf_obj$dtm)

  svd_obj <- build_svd_features_fast(
    dtm_norm = dtm_norm,
    n_components = n_components
  )

  feature_df <- df2_sub %>%
    dplyr::select(
      review_id,
      Rating,
      `Recommended IND`,
      `Positive Feedback Count`,
      Age,
      `Department Name`,
      word_count,
      char_count
    ) %>%
    dplyr::left_join(svd_obj$svd_df, by = "review_id")

  numeric_fill_cols <- setdiff(names(feature_df), c("review_id", "Department Name"))

  feature_df <- feature_df %>%
    dplyr::mutate(dplyr::across(dplyr::all_of(numeric_fill_cols), ~ tidyr::replace_na(.x, 0)))

  list(
    feature_df = feature_df,
    tfidf_obj = tfidf_obj,
    svd_obj = svd_obj
  )
}

get_cluster_input_text_only <- function(feature_df) {
  cluster_vars <- grep("^svd_", names(feature_df), value = TRUE)

  mat_df <- feature_df %>%
    dplyr::select(review_id, dplyr::all_of(cluster_vars)) %>%
    tidyr::drop_na()

  numeric_mat <- mat_df %>%
    dplyr::select(-review_id)

  scaled_mat <- scale(numeric_mat)

  list(
    review_ids = mat_df$review_id,
    scaled_mat = scaled_mat
  )
}
```

```{r define-helper-functions-3}
run_full_once <- function(df2,
                          clean_df_fast,
                          chosen_k = 5,
                          min_doc_freq = 15,
                          max_doc_prop = 0.30,
                          n_components = 40,
                          nstart = 25,
                          seed = 123) {
  feature_obj <- build_cluster_feature_df_fast(
    df2_sub = df2,
    clean_df_sub = clean_df_fast,
    min_doc_freq = min_doc_freq,
    max_doc_prop = max_doc_prop,
    n_components = n_components
  )

  cluster_input <- get_cluster_input_text_only(feature_obj$feature_df)

  set.seed(seed + chosen_k)
  km <- stats::kmeans(cluster_input$scaled_mat, centers = chosen_k, nstart = nstart)

  cluster_df <- tibble::tibble(
    review_id = cluster_input$review_ids,
    review_type = factor(km$cluster)
  )

  clustered_df <- feature_obj$feature_df %>%
    dplyr::left_join(cluster_df, by = "review_id") %>%
    dplyr::mutate(review_type = factor(review_type))

  list(
    chosen_k = chosen_k,
    feature_obj = feature_obj,
    cluster_input = cluster_input,
    kmeans = km,
    cluster_df = cluster_df,
    clustered_df = clustered_df
  )
}

build_distinctive_words_fast <- function(clustered_df, clean_df_fast, min_count = 20, top_n = 12) {
  cluster_word_counts <- clean_df_fast %>%
    dplyr::inner_join(
      clustered_df %>% dplyr::select(review_id, review_type),
      by = "review_id"
    ) %>%
    dplyr::count(review_type, word, name = "n_cluster")

  cluster_sizes <- clustered_df %>%
    dplyr::count(review_type, name = "reviews_in_type")

  total_reviews <- nrow(clustered_df)

  cluster_vs_rest <- cluster_word_counts %>%
    dplyr::group_by(word) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(n_rest = sum(n_cluster) - n_cluster) %>%
    dplyr::ungroup() %>%
    dplyr::left_join(cluster_sizes, by = "review_type") %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      reviews_rest = total_reviews - reviews_in_type,
      p_cluster = (n_cluster + 0.5) / (reviews_in_type + 1),
      p_rest = (n_rest + 0.5) / (reviews_rest + 1),
      log_odds = log(p_cluster / (1 - p_cluster)) - log(p_rest / (1 - p_rest))
    ) %>%
    dplyr::filter(n_cluster >= min_count)

  top_distinctive_words <- cluster_vs_rest %>%
    dplyr::group_by(review_type) %>%
    dplyr::slice_max(order_by = log_odds, n = top_n, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
    dplyr::ungroup()

  cluster_labels_table <- top_distinctive_words %>%
    dplyr::group_by(review_type) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(
      distinctive_words = paste(word, collapse = ", "),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  list(
    top_distinctive_words = top_distinctive_words,
    cluster_labels_table = cluster_labels_table
  )
}
```

```{r define-helper-functions-4}
summarize_one_k <- function(full_obj, clean_df_fast) {
  clustered_df <- full_obj$clustered_df
  chosen_k <- full_obj$chosen_k

  cluster_summary_table <- clustered_df %>%
    dplyr::group_by(review_type) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(
      n = dplyr::n(),
      proportion = n / nrow(clustered_df),
      recommend_rate = mean(`Recommended IND`, na.rm = TRUE),
      avg_rating = mean(Rating, na.rm = TRUE),
      median_rating = median(Rating, na.rm = TRUE),
      avg_feedback = mean(`Positive Feedback Count`, na.rm = TRUE),
      median_feedback = median(`Positive Feedback Count`, na.rm = TRUE),
      avg_age = mean(Age, na.rm = TRUE),
      median_age = median(Age, na.rm = TRUE),
      avg_word_count = mean(word_count, na.rm = TRUE),
      median_word_count = median(word_count, na.rm = TRUE),
      avg_char_count = mean(char_count, na.rm = TRUE),
      median_char_count = median(char_count, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(review_type) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(k = chosen_k)

  cluster_department_table <- clustered_df %>%
    dplyr::count(review_type, `Department Name`) %>%
    dplyr::group_by(review_type) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(prop_within_cluster = n / sum(n)) %>%
    dplyr::ungroup() %>%
    dplyr::mutate(k = chosen_k)

  distinctive_word_obj <- build_distinctive_words_fast(
    clustered_df = clustered_df,
    clean_df_fast = clean_df_fast,
    min_count = 20,
    top_n = 12
  )

  cluster_summary_table <- cluster_summary_table %>%
    dplyr::left_join(
      distinctive_word_obj$cluster_labels_table,
      by = "review_type"
    )

  list(
    cluster_summary_table = cluster_summary_table,
    cluster_department_table = cluster_department_table,
    top_distinctive_words = distinctive_word_obj$top_distinctive_words
  )
}
```

```{r define-helper-functions-5}
plot_one_k <- function(full_obj, summary_obj) {
  clustered_df <- full_obj$clustered_df
  chosen_k <- full_obj$chosen_k
  cluster_summary_table <- summary_obj$cluster_summary_table
  cluster_department_table <- summary_obj$cluster_department_table
  top_distinctive_words <- summary_obj$top_distinctive_words

  p_cluster_summary <- ggplot2::ggplot(
    cluster_summary_table,
    ggplot2::aes(
      x = recommend_rate,
      y = avg_rating,
      size = n,
      color = review_type,
      label = paste("Type", review_type)
    )
  ) +
    ggplot2::geom_point(alpha = 0.85) +
    ggplot2::geom_text(nudge_y = 0.03, show.legend = FALSE, fontface = "bold") +
    ggplot2::scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1)) +
    ggplot2::labs(
      title = paste("Review Types by Recommendation Rate and Average Rating (k =", chosen_k, ")"),
      subtitle = "Bubble size reflects the number of reviews in each cluster",
      x = "Recommendation Rate",
      y = "Average Rating",
      size = "Number of Reviews",
      color = "Review Type"
    ) +
    ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    ggplot2::theme(plot.title = ggplot2::element_text(face = "bold"))

  heatmap_df <- cluster_summary_table %>%
    dplyr::select(
      review_type,
      recommend_rate,
      avg_rating,
      avg_feedback,
      avg_age,
      avg_word_count,
      avg_char_count
    ) %>%
    tidyr::pivot_longer(
      cols = -review_type,
      names_to = "feature",
      values_to = "value"
    ) %>%
    dplyr::group_by(feature) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(z_value = as.numeric(scale(value))) %>%
    dplyr::ungroup()

  p_cluster_heatmap <- ggplot2::ggplot(heatmap_df, ggplot2::aes(x = feature, y = review_type, fill = z_value)) +
    ggplot2::geom_tile(color = "white") +
    ggplot2::geom_text(ggplot2::aes(label = round(value, 2)), size = 3) +
    ggplot2::labs(
      title = paste("Cluster Feature Heatmap (k =", chosen_k, ")"),
      subtitle = "Colors show standardized differences across clusters",
      x = "Feature",
      y = "Review Type",
      fill = "Z-score"
    ) +
    ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    ggplot2::theme(
      plot.title = ggplot2::element_text(face = "bold"),
      axis.text.x = ggplot2::element_text(angle = 35, hjust = 1)
    )

  distinctive_plot_df <- top_distinctive_words %>%
    dplyr::mutate(word = tidytext::reorder_within(word, log_odds, review_type))

  p_distinctive_words <- ggplot2::ggplot(
    distinctive_plot_df,
    ggplot2::aes(x = log_odds, y = word, fill = review_type)
  ) +
    ggplot2::geom_col(show.legend = FALSE) +
    tidytext::scale_y_reordered() +
    ggplot2::facet_wrap(~ review_type, scales = "free_y") +
    ggplot2::labs(
      title = paste("Distinctive Words by Review Type (k =", chosen_k, ")"),
      subtitle = "Words are ranked by cluster-vs-rest log-odds",
      x = "Distinctiveness (log-odds vs. rest)",
      y = NULL
    ) +
    ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    ggplot2::theme(
      plot.title = ggplot2::element_text(face = "bold"),
      strip.text = ggplot2::element_text(face = "bold")
    )

  dept_plot_df <- cluster_department_table %>%
    dplyr::mutate(`Department Name` = forcats::fct_lump_n(`Department Name`, n = 6))

  p_department_cluster <- ggplot2::ggplot(
    dept_plot_df,
    ggplot2::aes(x = review_type, y = prop_within_cluster, fill = `Department Name`)
  ) +
    ggplot2::geom_col(position = "fill") +
    ggplot2::scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format()) +
    ggplot2::labs(
      title = paste("Department Composition Within Review Types (k =", chosen_k, ")"),
      subtitle = "Checks whether clusters are still dominated by product category",
      x = "Review Type",
      y = "Proportion Within Review Type",
      fill = "Department"
    ) +
    ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    ggplot2::theme(plot.title = ggplot2::element_text(face = "bold"))

  p_wordcount_cluster <- ggplot2::ggplot(
    clustered_df,
    ggplot2::aes(x = review_type, y = word_count, fill = review_type)
  ) +
    ggplot2::geom_boxplot(show.legend = FALSE) +
    ggplot2::coord_cartesian(ylim = quantile(clustered_df$word_count, c(0, 0.95), na.rm = TRUE)) +
    ggplot2::labs(
      title = paste("Review Word Count by Review Type (k =", chosen_k, ")"),
      x = "Review Type",
      y = "Word Count"
    ) +
    ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    ggplot2::theme(plot.title = ggplot2::element_text(face = "bold"))

  p_recommend_cluster <- ggplot2::ggplot(
    clustered_df,
    ggplot2::aes(x = review_type, fill = factor(`Recommended IND`))
  ) +
    ggplot2::geom_bar(position = "fill") +
    ggplot2::scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format()) +
    ggplot2::labs(
      title = paste("Recommendation Composition Within Review Types (k =", chosen_k, ")"),
      x = "Review Type",
      y = "Proportion",
      fill = "Recommended"
    ) +
    ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    ggplot2::theme(plot.title = ggplot2::element_text(face = "bold"))

  list(
    cluster_summary = p_cluster_summary,
    cluster_heatmap = p_cluster_heatmap,
    distinctive_words = p_distinctive_words,
    department_cluster = p_department_cluster,
    wordcount_cluster = p_wordcount_cluster,
    recommend_cluster = p_recommend_cluster
  )
}
```

```{r run-clustering}
k_values <- 3:7

multi_k_full <- lapply(k_values, function(k) {
  full_obj <- run_full_once(
    df2 = df2,
    clean_df_fast = clean_df_fast,
    chosen_k = k,
    min_doc_freq = 15,
    max_doc_prop = 0.30,
    n_components = 40,
    nstart = 25,
    seed = 123
  )

  summary_obj <- summarize_one_k(full_obj, clean_df_fast)
  plot_obj <- plot_one_k(full_obj, summary_obj)

  list(
    full_obj = full_obj,
    summary_obj = summary_obj,
    plot_obj = plot_obj
  )
})

names(multi_k_full) <- paste0("k_", k_values)

all_cluster_summaries <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  lapply(multi_k_full, function(x) x$summary_obj$cluster_summary_table)
)

all_cluster_departments <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  lapply(multi_k_full, function(x) x$summary_obj$cluster_department_table)
)

all_distinctive_words <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  lapply(multi_k_full, function(x) {
    x$summary_obj$top_distinctive_words %>%
      dplyr::mutate(k = unique(x$summary_obj$cluster_summary_table$k))
  })
)

```

```{r cluster-plots, fig.width=10, fig.height=6}
for (k_name in names(multi_k_full)) {
  print(multi_k_full[[k_name]]$plot_obj$cluster_summary)
  print(multi_k_full[[k_name]]$plot_obj$cluster_heatmap)
  print(multi_k_full[[k_name]]$plot_obj$distinctive_words)
  print(multi_k_full[[k_name]]$plot_obj$department_cluster)
  print(multi_k_full[[k_name]]$plot_obj$wordcount_cluster)
  print(multi_k_full[[k_name]]$plot_obj$recommend_cluster)
}
```



```{r}
#NEW STUFF
```

```{r recommendation-logreg-train-test-helpers}
set.seed(42)

build_train_tfidf_for_logreg <- function(clean_train,
                                          min_doc_freq = 15,
                                          max_doc_prop = 0.30) {
  clean_train <- clean_train %>%
    dplyr::mutate(review_id = as.character(review_id))

  review_word_counts <- clean_train %>%
    dplyr::count(review_id, word, name = "n")

  total_docs <- dplyr::n_distinct(review_word_counts$review_id)

  vocab <- review_word_counts %>%
    dplyr::group_by(word) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(
      doc_n = dplyr::n_distinct(review_id),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      doc_prop = doc_n / total_docs,
      idf = log(total_docs / doc_n)
    ) %>%
    dplyr::filter(
      doc_n >= min_doc_freq,
      doc_prop <= max_doc_prop
    )

  tfidf_df <- review_word_counts %>%
    dplyr::inner_join(vocab %>% dplyr::select(word, idf), by = "word") %>%
    dplyr::group_by(review_id) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      total_words = sum(n),
      tf = n / total_words,
      tf_idf = tf * idf
    ) %>%
    dplyr::ungroup()

  dtm <- tfidf_df %>%
    tidytext::cast_sparse(row = review_id, column = word, value = tf_idf)

  list(
    dtm = dtm,
    vocab = vocab
  )
}

transform_tfidf_for_logreg <- function(clean_new, train_vocab) {
  clean_new <- clean_new %>%
    dplyr::mutate(review_id = as.character(review_id))

  review_word_counts <- clean_new %>%
    dplyr::count(review_id, word, name = "n")

  tfidf_df <- review_word_counts %>%
    dplyr::inner_join(
      train_vocab %>% dplyr::select(word, idf),
      by = "word"
    ) %>%
    dplyr::group_by(review_id) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      total_words = sum(n),
      tf = n / total_words,
      tf_idf = tf * idf
    ) %>%
    dplyr::ungroup()

  if (nrow(tfidf_df) == 0) {
    return(Matrix::Matrix(
      0,
      nrow = 0,
      ncol = nrow(train_vocab),
      sparse = TRUE,
      dimnames = list(character(), train_vocab$word)
    ))
  }

  tfidf_df %>%
    tidytext::cast_sparse(row = review_id, column = word, value = tf_idf)
}

align_sparse_matrix <- function(dtm, row_ids, col_words) {
  row_ids <- as.character(row_ids)

  aligned <- Matrix::Matrix(
    0,
    nrow = length(row_ids),
    ncol = length(col_words),
    sparse = TRUE,
    dimnames = list(row_ids, col_words)
  )

  common_rows <- intersect(rownames(dtm), row_ids)
  common_cols <- intersect(colnames(dtm), col_words)

  if (length(common_rows) > 0 && length(common_cols) > 0) {
    aligned[common_rows, common_cols] <- dtm[common_rows, common_cols]
  }

  aligned
}

make_svd_df <- function(dtm_norm, svd_v, prefix = "svd_") {
  svd_scores <- as.matrix(dtm_norm %*% svd_v)
  svd_scores <- as.data.frame(svd_scores)

  colnames(svd_scores) <- paste0(prefix, seq_len(ncol(svd_scores)))
  svd_scores$review_id <- rownames(dtm_norm)

  svd_scores
}
```

```{r}
logreg_base_df <- df2 %>%
  dplyr::mutate(review_id = as.character(review_id)) %>%
  dplyr::select(
    review_id,
    `Recommended IND`,
    char_count
  ) %>%
  tidyr::drop_na(`Recommended IND`, char_count)

set.seed(42)

train_ids <- logreg_base_df %>%
  dplyr::group_by(`Recommended IND`) %>%
  dplyr::slice_sample(prop = 0.80) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::pull(review_id)

test_ids <- setdiff(logreg_base_df$review_id, train_ids)

train_base_df <- logreg_base_df %>%
  dplyr::filter(review_id %in% train_ids)

test_base_df <- logreg_base_df %>%
  dplyr::filter(review_id %in% test_ids)

clean_train <- clean_df_fast %>%
  dplyr::mutate(review_id = as.character(review_id)) %>%
  dplyr::filter(review_id %in% train_ids)

clean_test <- clean_df_fast %>%
  dplyr::mutate(review_id = as.character(review_id)) %>%
  dplyr::filter(review_id %in% test_ids)

split_check <- tibble::tibble(
  split = c("Train", "Test"),
  n_reviews = c(nrow(train_base_df), nrow(test_base_df)),
  recommended_rate = c(
    mean(train_base_df$`Recommended IND`),
    mean(test_base_df$`Recommended IND`)
  )
)

print(split_check)
```

```{r}
n_components <- 40

train_tfidf_obj <- build_train_tfidf_for_logreg(
  clean_train = clean_train,
  min_doc_freq = 15,
  max_doc_prop = 0.30
)

train_vocab <- train_tfidf_obj$vocab

train_dtm <- align_sparse_matrix(
  dtm = train_tfidf_obj$dtm,
  row_ids = train_base_df$review_id,
  col_words = train_vocab$word
)

test_dtm_raw <- transform_tfidf_for_logreg(
  clean_new = clean_test,
  train_vocab = train_vocab
)

test_dtm <- align_sparse_matrix(
  dtm = test_dtm_raw,
  row_ids = test_base_df$review_id,
  col_words = train_vocab$word
)

train_dtm_norm <- row_normalize_sparse(train_dtm)
test_dtm_norm <- row_normalize_sparse(test_dtm)

n_components_use <- min(
  n_components,
  nrow(train_dtm_norm) - 1,
  ncol(train_dtm_norm) - 1
)

if (n_components_use < 2) {
  stop("Not enough rows or vocabulary terms to fit SVD.")
}

svd_res <- irlba::irlba(
  train_dtm_norm,
  nv = n_components_use
)

train_svd_df <- make_svd_df(
  dtm_norm = train_dtm_norm,
  svd_v = svd_res$v
)

test_svd_df <- make_svd_df(
  dtm_norm = test_dtm_norm,
  svd_v = svd_res$v
)

train_logreg_df <- train_base_df %>%
  dplyr::left_join(train_svd_df, by = "review_id")

test_logreg_df <- test_base_df %>%
  dplyr::left_join(test_svd_df, by = "review_id")

svd_cols <- grep("^svd_", names(train_logreg_df), value = TRUE)

train_logreg_df <- train_logreg_df %>%
  tidyr::drop_na(`Recommended IND`, char_count, dplyr::all_of(svd_cols))

test_logreg_df <- test_logreg_df %>%
  tidyr::drop_na(`Recommended IND`, char_count, dplyr::all_of(svd_cols))
```

```{r}
svd_formula <- as.formula(
  paste("`Recommended IND` ~ char_count +", paste(svd_cols, collapse = " + "))
)

svd_glm <- stats::glm(
  svd_formula,
  data = train_logreg_df,
  family = stats::binomial()
)

cat("\n========================================\n")
cat("LOGISTIC REGRESSION USING TRAINING SET ONLY\n")
cat("========================================\n")
print(summary(svd_glm))

svd_glm_results <- broom::tidy(svd_glm, conf.int = TRUE) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    odds_ratio = exp(estimate),
    conf.low.or = exp(conf.low),
    conf.high.or = exp(conf.high)
  )

cat("\n========================================\n")
cat("TIDY LOGISTIC REGRESSION RESULTS FROM TRAINING MODEL\n")
cat("========================================\n")
print(svd_glm_results, width = Inf)
```

```{r}
test_logreg_df <- test_logreg_df %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    predicted_prob = stats::predict(
      svd_glm,
      newdata = test_logreg_df,
      type = "response"
    ),
    predicted_class = dplyr::if_else(predicted_prob >= 0.5, 1L, 0L)
  )

conf_mat_df <- test_logreg_df %>%
  dplyr::mutate(actual_class = as.integer(`Recommended IND`)) %>%
  dplyr::count(actual_class, predicted_class, name = "n") %>%
  tidyr::complete(
    actual_class = c(0L, 1L),
    predicted_class = c(0L, 1L),
    fill = list(n = 0)
  )
```

```{r}
p_confusion <- ggplot2::ggplot(
  conf_mat_df,
  ggplot2::aes(
    x = factor(predicted_class),
    y = factor(actual_class),
    fill = n
  )
) +
  ggplot2::geom_tile(color = "white") +
  ggplot2::geom_text(
    ggplot2::aes(label = n),
    size = 6,
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  ggplot2::scale_fill_gradient(low = "white", high = "steelblue") +
  ggplot2::labs(
    title = "Confusion Matrix: Test Set Logistic Regression Using SVD Features",
    x = "Predicted Class",
    y = "Actual Class",
    fill = "Count"
  ) +
  ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  ggplot2::theme(
    plot.title = ggplot2::element_text(face = "bold")
  )

print(p_confusion)
```

```{r}
tn <- conf_mat_df %>%
  dplyr::filter(actual_class == 0, predicted_class == 0) %>%
  dplyr::pull(n)

fp <- conf_mat_df %>%
  dplyr::filter(actual_class == 0, predicted_class == 1) %>%
  dplyr::pull(n)

fn <- conf_mat_df %>%
  dplyr::filter(actual_class == 1, predicted_class == 0) %>%
  dplyr::pull(n)

tp <- conf_mat_df %>%
  dplyr::filter(actual_class == 1, predicted_class == 1) %>%
  dplyr::pull(n)

accuracy <- (tp + tn) / (tp + tn + fp + fn)

precision <- ifelse(
  (tp + fp) == 0,
  NA,
  tp / (tp + fp)
)

recall <- ifelse(
  (tp + fn) == 0,
  NA,
  tp / (tp + fn)
)

specificity <- ifelse(
  (tn + fp) == 0,
  NA,
  tn / (tn + fp)
)

f1 <- ifelse(
  is.na(precision) | is.na(recall) | (precision + recall) == 0,
  NA,
  2 * precision * recall / (precision + recall)
)
```

```{r}
svd_predictions_df <- df2 %>%
  dplyr::mutate(review_id = as.character(review_id)) %>%
  dplyr::left_join(
    test_logreg_df %>%
      dplyr::select(review_id, predicted_prob, predicted_class),
    by = "review_id"
  )

top_positive_reviews <- svd_predictions_df %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(predicted_prob)) %>%
  dplyr::select(review_id, `Review Text`, predicted_prob, `Recommended IND`) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(predicted_prob)) %>%
  dplyr::slice_head(n = 15)

top_negative_reviews <- svd_predictions_df %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(predicted_prob)) %>%
  dplyr::select(review_id, `Review Text`, predicted_prob, `Recommended IND`) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(predicted_prob) %>%
  dplyr::slice_head(n = 15)

cat("\n========================================\n")
cat("TOP POSITIVELY PREDICTED TEST REVIEWS\n")
cat("========================================\n")
print(top_positive_reviews, n = 15)

cat("\n========================================\n")
cat("TOP NEGATIVELY PREDICTED TEST REVIEWS\n")
cat("========================================\n")
print(top_negative_reviews, n = 15)
```

```{r recommendation-logreg-important-svd-dimensions}
important_svd_dims <- svd_glm_results %>%
  dplyr::filter(stringr::str_detect(term, "^svd_")) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    abs_estimate = abs(estimate),
    direction = dplyr::case_when(
      estimate > 0 ~ "Positive association with recommendation",
      estimate < 0 ~ "Negative association with recommendation",
      TRUE ~ "No association"
    )
  ) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(abs_estimate)) %>%
  dplyr::slice_head(n = 8)

important_svd_dims %>%
  dplyr::select(
    dimension = term,
    estimate,
    odds_ratio,
    p.value,
    direction
  ) %>%
  knitr::kable(
    digits = 4,
    caption = "Most Important SVD Dimensions in the Train-Test Logistic Regression Model"
  )
```

```{r recommendation-logreg-interpret-svd-helper}
interpret_svd_dimension_train <- function(dimension_name,
                                          train_logreg_df,
                                          clean_train,
                                          top_prop = 0.10,
                                          min_count = 5,
                                          top_n = 15) {
  dimension_scores <- train_logreg_df %>%
    dplyr::select(review_id, score = dplyr::all_of(dimension_name)) %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(score))

  low_cutoff <- stats::quantile(dimension_scores$score, top_prop, na.rm = TRUE)
  high_cutoff <- stats::quantile(dimension_scores$score, 1 - top_prop, na.rm = TRUE)

  dimension_groups <- dimension_scores %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      side = dplyr::case_when(
        score <= low_cutoff ~ "Low side",
        score >= high_cutoff ~ "High side",
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      )
    ) %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(side))

  side_sizes <- dimension_groups %>%
    dplyr::count(side, name = "reviews_in_side")

  total_reviews <- nrow(dimension_groups)

  word_counts <- clean_train %>%
    dplyr::inner_join(
      dimension_groups %>% dplyr::select(review_id, side),
      by = "review_id"
    ) %>%
    dplyr::count(side, word, name = "n_side")

  side_vs_rest <- word_counts %>%
    dplyr::group_by(word) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(n_rest = sum(n_side) - n_side) %>%
    dplyr::ungroup() %>%
    dplyr::left_join(side_sizes, by = "side") %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      reviews_rest = total_reviews - reviews_in_side,
      p_side = (n_side + 0.5) / (reviews_in_side + 1),
      p_rest = (n_rest + 0.5) / (reviews_rest + 1),
      log_odds = log(p_side / (1 - p_side)) - log(p_rest / (1 - p_rest))
    ) %>%
    dplyr::filter(n_side >= min_count)

  top_words <- side_vs_rest %>%
    dplyr::group_by(side) %>%
    dplyr::slice_max(order_by = log_odds, n = top_n, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
    dplyr::ungroup() %>%
    dplyr::mutate(dimension = dimension_name) %>%
    dplyr::select(dimension, side, word, n_side, log_odds)

  example_reviews <- dimension_groups %>%
    dplyr::group_by(side) %>%
    dplyr::slice_max(order_by = abs(score), n = 5, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
    dplyr::ungroup() %>%
    dplyr::left_join(
      df2 %>%
        dplyr::select(review_id, `Review Text`, Rating, `Recommended IND`),
      by = "review_id"
    ) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(dimension = dimension_name) %>%
    dplyr::select(
      dimension,
      side,
      review_id,
      score,
      Rating,
      `Recommended IND`,
      `Review Text`
    )

  list(
    top_words = top_words,
    example_reviews = example_reviews
  )
}
```

```{r recommendation-logreg-run-svd-interpretation}
important_dimension_names <- important_svd_dims$term

svd_interpretation_list <- lapply(
  important_dimension_names,
  interpret_svd_dimension_train,
  train_logreg_df = train_logreg_df,
  clean_train = clean_train,
  top_prop = 0.10,
  min_count = 5,
  top_n = 15
)

names(svd_interpretation_list) <- important_dimension_names

svd_interpretation_words <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  lapply(svd_interpretation_list, function(x) x$top_words)
)

svd_interpretation_examples <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  lapply(svd_interpretation_list, function(x) x$example_reviews)
)

svd_interpretation_words %>%
  dplyr::arrange(dimension, side, dplyr::desc(log_odds)) %>%
  knitr::kable(
    digits = 3,
    caption = "Distinctive Words on the High and Low Ends of Important SVD Dimensions"
  )
```

```{r recommendation-logreg-svd-word-summary-table}
svd_word_summary <- svd_interpretation_words %>%
  dplyr::group_by(dimension, side) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(log_odds), .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    distinctive_words = paste(head(word, 10), collapse = ", "),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from = side,
    values_from = distinctive_words
  ) %>%
  dplyr::left_join(
    important_svd_dims %>%
      dplyr::select(
        dimension = term,
        estimate,
        odds_ratio,
        direction
      ),
    by = "dimension"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(abs(estimate)))

svd_word_summary %>%
  knitr::kable(
    digits = 4,
    caption = "Human-Readable Word Patterns for Important SVD Dimensions"
  )
```

```{r recommendation-logreg-svd-example-reviews}
svd_interpretation_examples %>%
  dplyr::arrange(dimension, side, dplyr::desc(abs(score))) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    short_review = stringr::str_trunc(`Review Text`, width = 220)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(
    dimension,
    side,
    score,
    Rating,
    `Recommended IND`,
    short_review
  ) %>%
  knitr::kable(
    digits = 3,
    caption = "Example Reviews from the High and Low Ends of Important SVD Dimensions"
  )
```

```{r}

```
